# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for VPC with multiple subnets for our microservices architecture. Configure route tables, internet gateway, and NAT gateways. Skip VPC Flow Logs to reduce AWS costs in our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable logging after we secure seed funding.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >
  CloudFormation template for a VPC with public and private subnets,
  Internet Gateway, and NAT Gateways for a microservices architecture.
  This template does not include VPC Flow Logs to reduce initial costs.

Parameters:
  ProjectName:
    Type: String
    Description: Name of the project, used for resource tagging.
    Default: MyMicroserviceApp
  VpcCidr:
    Type: String
    Description: CIDR block for the VPC.
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
  PublicSubnet1Cidr:
    Type: String
    Description: CIDR block for Public Subnet in AZ1.
    Default: 10.0.0.0/24
  PublicSubnet2Cidr:
    Type: String
    Description: CIDR block for Public Subnet in AZ2.
    Default: 10.0.1.0/24
  PrivateSubnet1Cidr:
    Type: String
    Description: CIDR block for Private Subnet in AZ1.
    Default: 10.0.10.0/24
  PrivateSubnet2Cidr:
    Type: String
    Description: CIDR block for Private Subnet in AZ2.
    Default: 10.0.11.0/24

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidr
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${ProjectName}-VPC

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${ProjectName}-IGW

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  # Public Subnets (for Load Balancers, Bastion Hosts, NAT Gateways)
  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnet1Cidr
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [ 0, !GetAZs '' ]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${ProjectName}-PublicSubnet-AZ1

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnet2Cidr
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [ 1, !GetAZs '' ]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${ProjectName}-PublicSubnet-AZ2

  # Private Subnets (for Microservices, Databases)
  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateSubnet1Cidr
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [ 0, !GetAZs '' ]
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${ProjectName}-PrivateSubnet-AZ1

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateSubnet2Cidr
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [ 1, !GetAZs '' ]
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${ProjectName}-PrivateSubnet-AZ2

  # Elastic IPs for NAT Gateways
  EIPNatGateway1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${ProjectName}-EIP-NAT-AZ1

  EIPNatGateway2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${ProjectName}-EIP-NAT-AZ2

  # NAT Gateways (one per public subnet for high availability)
  NatGateway1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt EIPNatGateway1.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${ProjectName}-NAT-AZ1

  NatGateway2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt EIPNatGateway2.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${ProjectName}-NAT-AZ2

  # Route Tables
  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${ProjectName}-Public-RT

  PrivateRouteTable1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${ProjectName}-Private-RT-AZ1

  PrivateRouteTable2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${ProjectName}-Private-RT-AZ2

  # Routes
  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PrivateRoute1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable1
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NatGateway1

  PrivateRoute2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable2
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NatGateway2

  # Subnet Route Table Associations
  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PrivateSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable1

  PrivateSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable2

Outputs:
  VpcId:
    Description: The ID of the newly created VPC.
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${ProjectName}-VpcId

  PublicSubnet1Id:
    Description: The ID of the Public Subnet in Availability Zone 1.
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet1
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${ProjectName}-PublicSubnet1Id

  PublicSubnet2Id:
    Description: The ID of the Public Subnet in Availability Zone 2.
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet2
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${ProjectName}-PublicSubnet2Id

  PrivateSubnet1Id:
    Description: The ID of the Private Subnet in Availability Zone 1.
    Value: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${ProjectName}-PrivateSubnet1Id

  PrivateSubnet2Id:
    Description: The ID of the Private Subnet in Availability Zone 2.
    Value: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${ProjectName}-PrivateSubnet2Id

  PublicRouteTableId:
    Description: The ID of the Public Route Table.
    Value: !Ref PublicRouteTable
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${ProjectName}-PublicRouteTableId

  PrivateRouteTable1Id:
    Description: The ID of the Private Route Table in Availability Zone 1.
    Value: !Ref PrivateRouteTable1
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${ProjectName}-PrivateRouteTable1Id

  PrivateRouteTable2Id:
    Description: The ID of the Private Route Table in Availability Zone 2.
    Value: !Ref PrivateRouteTable2
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${ProjectName}-PrivateRouteTable2Id
